dimensions.name: Product completeness
dimensions.evidence: plan.md defines product, MVP, and success criteria.
dimensions.gap: The product slice is still too vague to measure.

dimensions.name: Core UX
dimensions.evidence: GOAL-0001 readiness evidence: add, complete, delete, reload, and persisted task rendering were verified in one browser smoke pass.
dimensions.gap: The primary user flow is not yet proven usable.

dimensions.name: Data persistence
dimensions.evidence: The task list uses localStorage and reload persistence was smoke tested.
dimensions.gap: User data durability has not been proven.

dimensions.name: Error handling
dimensions.evidence: Failure, empty, or edge states are not yet handled.
dimensions.gap: Failure, empty, or edge states are not yet handled.

dimensions.name: Validation coverage
dimensions.evidence: GOAL-0001 readiness evidence: `npm run build` and one browser smoke pass covered the primary task-list flow.
dimensions.gap: The primary behavior does not have repeatable validation evidence.

dimensions.name: Security baseline
dimensions.evidence: Basic security and misuse boundaries are not yet explicit.
dimensions.gap: Basic security and misuse boundaries are not yet explicit.

dimensions.name: Deployment readiness
dimensions.evidence: The project is not yet proven runnable outside the local development path.
dimensions.gap: The project is not yet proven runnable outside the local development path.

dimensions.name: Operations and docs
dimensions.evidence: Operational notes, setup, rollback, or handoff docs are not sufficient.
dimensions.gap: Operational notes, setup, rollback, or handoff docs are not sufficient.

dimensions.name: Maintainability
dimensions.evidence: The codebase has not accumulated enough maintainability evidence.
dimensions.gap: The codebase has not accumulated enough maintainability evidence.

required_evidence: Product and MVP slice are measurable.
One core user flow works locally.

advancement.recommendation: Tiny MVP gate is ready. Recommend updating plan.md Current Stage to Usable MVP after evidence review.

next_pressure.recommended_goal: Review readiness evidence and update plan.md Current Stage to Usable MVP if the evidence is accepted.
next_pressure.work_boundary: Do not auto-edit plan.md. Review evidence first, then update Current Stage only when the user accepts the stage advancement.
next_pressure.validation_signal: Record the stage advancement decision or reason for staying in the current stage.
